title: lithocarpus nymanianus
intro: Lithocarpus nymanianus, also known as the Himalayan lirodo or Himalayan evergreen oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Lithocarpus nymanianus include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Lithocarpus nymanianus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
